hero_subheadline: Evidence-grade PASS/FAIL/NEEDS_REVIEW verdicts with deterministic rules and code-level citations. Built on ThreatXtension security signals.

trust_bullets.text: Static analysis only—no browsing capture or runtime monitoring
Files processed securely and automatically deleted after 24 hours

trust_bullets.footnote: Reports are generated from deterministic rule evaluation and code evidence. They do not constitute legal advice or guarantee compliance.

scan_helper_text: Paste a Chrome Web Store URL or upload a .crx/.zip file

what_you_get.title: Deterministic Verdicts
what_you_get.description: Clear PASS/FAIL/NEEDS_REVIEW outcomes based on rule evaluation, not subjective scoring

what_you_get.title: Evidence Table
what_you_get.description: File path, line range, and code snippet for every finding—ready for audit trails

what_you_get.title: Policy Citations
what_you_get.description: Direct references to Chrome Web Store policies and DPDP v0 requirements

what_you_get.title: Exportable Reports
what_you_get.description: JSON export available now; PDF reports coming soon

footer_disclaimer: Extension Compliance Scanner generates compliance reports using deterministic rule evaluation and static code analysis. Reports are evidence-based and do not constitute legal advice, compliance guarantees, or endorsement of any extension. All uploaded files are processed securely and deleted after 24 hours.
